TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Irv_Brenner, title = Irv_Brenner, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Irv_Brenner} }

S.FORM: Irv Brenner sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1913 , ryax sa tay 31 nqu tay 5, Irv Brenner, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 1991) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Irv Brenner sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1913 , ryax sa tay 31 nqu tay 5, Irv Brenner, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 1991) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: ir* βrenner s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa. kawas~ɕ taj **** , rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, ir* βrenner, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. (mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
